name: 🚀 StreamElite — SEO DOMINATION v6 (7 Agents | 1 Article/Jour)

parameters.body:
={"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 800, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "Tu es un expert SEO. Tu generes des plans d action en JSON pur sans markdown ni backticks."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Article : '{{ $json.keyword }}'
Score : {{ $json.qualityScore }}/10

JSON pur :
{
  "actions_j1_j3": ["3 actions urgentes 72h"],
  "actions_j7": ["3 actions SEO 7 jours"],
  "actions_j30": ["3 actions SEO 30 jours"],
  "maillage_interne": ["2 articles a lier"],
  "cluster_articles": ["3 idees articles"],
  "kpis_search_console": ["4 metriques"],
  "positionnement_estime": "delai realiste en jours"
}"}]}
